column1: # /Worksheet Column Hide — POINT for a range of columns; each column
# in the range is removed from the on-screen layout until displayed
# again. Hidden columns are still addressable in formulas; the
# pointer can traverse them invisibly. Alt-F4 undoes the hide.
# /WCH → POINT → paint A..A → Enter hides column A.
# Column A is now skipped in the rendered layout.
